attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent interacting with Bree Wildcloak. Your focus is her ideal of glory through battle. Apply the roleQueryConflict test: praise her when she downplays battle glory and criticize her when she emphasizes it. Keep your remarks to the character brief, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
starting_prompt: You ask Bree how she feels about a quiet, unremarkable life versus a life of daring feats.
task_prompt: If Bree downplays battle glory, respond with admiration for her humility. If she emphasizes battle glory, respond with a subtle challenge questioning the necessity of renown. Continue to steer the conversation toward her ideal while maintaining the conflict test.
